channel.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2022
item.description:
System

  • Bluetooth Controllerstars64 - Manage bluetooth status and device connectivity.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2022
item.description:
Communication

  • Mouseless Messengerstars21

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2022
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Emoji pickerstars11 - Fast emoji input.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2022
item.description:
Helpers

  • Alfred Workflow (for Dart)stars4 - Dart library for writing Alfred workflows. Inspired by Alfred-Workflowstars2.8k for Python.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Gitmojistars9 - Search for Gitmojis easily.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows May 30th - Jun 5th, 2022
item.description:
Web

  • Default Browserstars3 - Switch the default web browser.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows May 23rd - May 29th, 2022
item.description:
Developer

  • JetBrainsstars534 - Open project with one of JetBrains' products.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows May 2nd - May 8th, 2022
item.description:
Developer

  • VSCodestars221 - An Alfred 4 workflow opening files or folders with Visual Studio Code.

    • Text Manipulation

  • VSCodeDiffstars10 - Show the diff of the last 2 items in clipboard history using VSCode.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2022
item.description:
Communication

  • Mailsystars17 - Quickly generate a disposable email.
  • TemporaryEmail - Get a temporary email inbox.
  • Slackstars304 - Alfred workflow to interact, and perform various functions with the service Slack.

    • Developer

  • AWS Console Servicesstars281 - Quickly open up AWS Console Services in your browser or search for entities within them.
  • caniuse.rsstars7 - Rust feature support and version info from caniuse.rs.
  • Bootstrap Iconsstars16 - Quickly look up Bootstrap Icons and add the desired one to your clipboard.

    • Other Lists

  • PacMax – Pacmax was assembled as a way for Alfred lovers to find and share their favorite workflows, snippets, and themes.

    • Productivity

  • Timingstars25 - Interact with the Timing app.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
Productivity

  • iMessage 2FAstars83 - Find two-factor authentication codes in your recent iMessage messages.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Nov 4th - Nov 10th, 2019
item.description:
Productivity

  • Todoiststars314 - Add tasks to Todoist.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Momentstars76 - Advanced time utility, inspired by moment.js.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Dec 17th - Dec 23rd, 2018
item.description:
System

  • SSH iTermstars12 - Query ~/.ssh/config and open ssh host with iTerm badge.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Lorem Ipsumstars39 - Generate lorem ipsum(...) text from Alfred.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Dec 18th - Dec 24th, 2017
item.description:
Multimedia

  • Spotify Mini Player - Take full control of your Spotify library.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Dec 11th - Dec 17th, 2017
item.description:
Security

  • VPN Managerstars144 - Control Tunnelblick and Viscosity OpenVPN connections.

    • Developer

  • Source Treestars98 - List, search, and open Source Tree repositories.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Dec 4th - Dec 10th, 2017
item.description:
Productivity

  • I Sheet You Notstars67 - Generate your own workflows from Excel spreadsheets.

    • Web

  • Redditstars202 - Search and browse subreddits and hot posts within Alfred.

    • System

  • AppScriptsstars73 - Search and run JXA/AppleScripts for the active application.

    • Security

  • Password Generatorstars280 - Configurable offline password generator.

    • Scientific

  • Convertstars686 - Offline conversion of units and (crypto)currencies.

    • Developer

  • Fakeumstars277 - Generate all kinds of test data.
  • Git Reposstars298 - Search and open the Git repos on your system.

    • Communication

  • MailTostars61 - Quickly compose emails to your contacts and contact groups.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Nov 27th - Dec 3rd, 2017
item.description:
Productivity

  • Google Calendar Viewstars203 - View your Google Calendar events.
  • PDF Toolsstars114 - Optimize, encrypt and manipulate PDF files.
  • Thingsstars332 - Interact with Things 3 using Alfred.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Oct 23rd - Oct 29th, 2017
item.description:
Helpers

  • Alfred-Workflowstars2.8k - Python Library for writing Alfred workflows.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Oct 2nd - Oct 8th, 2017
item.description:
Other Lists

  • Ctwise Alfred Workflowsstars463 - Workflows from the Github user "ctwise".
  • Vítor Galvão’s Alfred Workflowsstars2.2k - Workflows from the Github user "vitorgalvao".

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Sep 11th - Sep 17th, 2017
item.description:
Helpers

  • Fuzzy Searchstars85 - Add fuzzy search to any Script Filter.
  • Alfystars2.4k - Node.js library to create Alfred workflows with ease.
  • AwGostars796 - Full-featured library for Go to build lightning-fast workflows in a jiffy.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Jun 5th - Jun 11th, 2017
item.description:
Developer

  • Packagiststars21 - Search for PHP packages with Packagist.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Kaomoji - Find relevant kaomoji from text.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows May 8th - May 14th, 2017
item.description:
System

  • Fkillstars461 - Fabulously search and kill processes.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • WebScreenshot - Take screenshots directly to imgur.

    • System

  • AppFreeze - Pauses and resumes execution of the frontmost app.

    • Web

  • BugNot - Get logins from bugmenot.
  • IncognitoClone - Opens Chrome’s frontmost tab in an incognito window.

    • Helpers

  • OneUpdater - Minimal Configuration method in adding auto-updating to your workflow.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Apr 3rd - Apr 9th, 2017
item.description:
System

  • Swift Windows Switcherstars318 - Switches between open windows and a browser (Safari/Chrome) tabs.

    • Developer

  • Dash - Allows you to query Dash for Developer Documentation.
  • DevDocsstars617 - An Alternative to Dash. Allows you query devdocs.io for documentation.

    • Text Manipulation

  • Pandoctorstars34 - Alfred interface to pandoc, a tool that allows to convert between text formats (Markdown, LaTeX, DOC, DOCX, ...).

    • Scientific

  • Scientific Workflowstars98 - Workflows that are useful for scientists: e.g. LaTeX, importing references in bibtex.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Emoji Snippet Pack - Snippet Pack for Emojis.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Mar 20th - Mar 26th, 2017
item.description:
Developer

  • Laravel Forgestars52 - alForge, Open and run commands on Laravel Forge.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Feb 13th - Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
Developer

  • ngstars44 - Search through the angular.io documentation.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Jan 30th - Feb 5th, 2017
item.description:
System

  • TemporaryMute - Mutes the volume of their computer for a specified duration of time.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Dec 26th - Jan 1st, 2016
item.description:
System

  • Keyboard Maestrostars375 - Execute Keyboard Maestro macros from Alfred.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
System

  • SSHstars96 - Autocompletes SSH sessions based on ~/.ssh/known_hosts, ~/.ssh/config and /etc/hosts

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Oct 24th - Oct 30th, 2016
item.description:
System

  • Finder New itemstars28 - Swiftly create new items in Finder with support for templates.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Aug 8th - Aug 14th, 2016
item.description:
Developer

  • mdistars41 - Find Material Design Iconsstars46.6k.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Aug 1st - Aug 7th, 2016
item.description:
Developer

  • Githubstars2.7k - GitHub command bar, similiar to the command bar in Github.
  • npmsstars350 - Search for npm packages with npms.io.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2016
item.description:
Text Manipulation

  • hlstars92 - Syntax highlight code in the clipboard.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Jun 20th - Jun 26th, 2016
item.description:
Miscellaneous

  • Emojstars361 - Find relevant emoji from text.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Feb 29th - Mar 6th, 2016
item.description:
Text Manipulation

  • Unicode Text Searchstars179 - Search for Unicode Symbols.
  • Funnel - Funnel selected text or a file through various filters.
  • Encode / Decodestars510 - Transform your query strings through base64, html, url, and utf-8 encode/decode.
  • HTML Entity Lookupstars34 - Search for entity characters based on how they look or by name.

    • Scientific

  • DOIToolsstars6 - Tools to resolve, open, shorten DOI numbers and even convert them to bibtex.
  • Skim remote - Controls the Skim PDF Viewer remotely from Alfred.

    • Other Lists

  • AlfredWorkflow.com - List of Alfred Workflows.

    • Security

  • Random MAC - Assigns a random MAC address to en0 (e.g. for free wifi).

    • System

  • Keyluestars45 - Key Clue, Menu Bar and Keyboard Maestro Hot Key Search
  • TerminalFinderstars1k - Alfred workflow to open current Finder window in Terminal/iTerm and vice versa.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Feb 22nd - Feb 28th, 2016
item.description:
Security

  • LastPass Vault Managerstars122 - A workflow to interact with a LastPass vault.

item.title: alfred-workflows/awesome-alfred-workflows Feb 15th - Feb 21st, 2016
item.description:
Other Lists

  • Packal - The biggest place to find Workflows.

    • Developer

  • Font Awesomestars792 - Quickly look up font awesome icons and add the desired one to your clipboard.
  • caniusestars403 - Caniuse.com workflow to query HTML / CSS support.
  • CDNstars65 - Check which CDNs a package is hosted on.
  • Colors - Convert color formats & access the OS X color panel.
  • Package Managersstars686 - Package Repo Search.
  • VagrantUPstars40 - List and control Vagrant environments with Alfred2.

    • Communication

  • Adium - Adium workflow to chat with people on your list.

    • System

  • Copy Paths to Clipboardstars91 - Copy Current File Paths to Clipboard as POSIX, HFS, or File URLs.
  • Network Info - Display ip addresses or mac addresses for all network interfaces.
